title: Vendor docker/docker, fsouza and more #2
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Vendors in fsouza/docker-client, docker/docker and
a few more related. Of particular note, changes to the TweakCapabilities()
function from docker/docker along with the parse.IDMappingOptions() function
from Buildah. Please pay particular attention to the related changes in
the call from libpod to those functions during the review.

Passes baseline tests.

comments.body: Not sure how I managed to mess up #2627, but this replaces it after #2625 has now been merged.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM, but I'd like to hold until @rhatdan does a once-over on the capabilities changes

Bizarre.  I see no use for the new fields that they added to TweakCapabilities.
LGTM
/lgtm
